problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
